General.Name: Wisdom Sports Group
General.Description: China Frontier Technology Group, an investment holding company, provides events operation and marketing services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Events Operation and Marketing; Sports Services; and Trading Business segments. The Events Operation and Marketing segment provides marketing services in conjunction with sports-related competitions, including corporate sponsorship. The Sports Services segment offers sports-related competition services primarily to government, marathon runners, and media companies. This segment is also involved in the live broadcasting of tournaments; marathon timing; and program production and equipment rental activities. The Trading Business segment provides cigar and related products. The company was formerly known as Wisdom Sports Group and changed its name to China Frontier Technology Group in July 2024. China Frontier Technology Group was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Yardley Commercial Building, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
